_note: Corrected 2026-07-05: the prior 3/9/27 counts came from a qa_step bug (shared across qa_hensel_selforg_experiment.py, qa_hensel_orbit_cycling_experiment.py, qa_bateson_coupling_experiment.py) that computed e_new from the already-updated b_new instead of the original (b,e). Fixed in all three scripts; corrected orbit counts are 2/5/14, matching both a fresh independent simulation and cert [499]'s independently-derived 72/8/1 (=3 cosmos of 24 + 1 satellite of 8 + 1 singularity = 5 total at m=9) structure.

fractal_self_similarity.pattern: cosmos orbit count scales 3x per level (0,3,9,27,... at m=3,9,27,81); satellite+singularity invariant
